Why SlayCal

Built for people who hate tracking calories

Most nutrition apps make you do all the work. SlayCal does it for you.

photo_camera

Instant Meal Recognition

Point your camera at a plate, barcode, or nutrition label. Get a full calorie and macro breakdown in under 3 seconds — no typing required.

cooking

Your Fridge. Infinite Recipes.

Scan what's in your fridge and get step-by-step recipes built around exactly what you have — zero waste, zero stress.

monitor_heart

Know Your Macros at a Glance

See your protein, carbs, and fat progress update in real time as you log meals. Hit your daily targets without doing any math.

water_drop

Hydration, Finally Effortless

Tap once to log water. Track your daily intake with a visual ring and get gentle reminders before you fall behind.

show_chart

See the Trend, Not Just the Day

Weight charts, BMI tracker, weekly calorie breakdowns — all in one clean dashboard that shows how far you've actually come.

auto_awesome

Goals That Adapt to You

Enter your body metrics and target. SlayCal sets precise daily calorie, protein, carb, fat, and water targets — then adjusts as you progress.

explore

Recipe Explorer

Browse hundreds of healthy, macro-balanced recipes. Save favorites, filter by goal, and follow guided step-by-step cooking.

stars

Go Unlimited with Pro

Unlock unlimited scans, priority processing, and early access to new features. Start free with 500 credits — no credit card needed.

verified iOS & Android
lock Privacy first
bolt Real-time scanning
star 4.8 ★ rating
How It Works

From snap to insight in 3 seconds

No setup. No manual entries. Just open, snap, and you're done.

photo_camera
01

Snap Your Meal

Take a photo of your food, a barcode, a nutrition label, or even your fridge. SlayCal figures out the rest.

psychology
02

Get Instant Nutrition Data

Calories, protein, carbs, and fat — calculated and logged automatically. No searching, no typing.

trending_up
03

Watch Your Progress Build

Your daily dashboard updates in real time. Hit your targets, spot patterns, and actually see the results over time.

rocket_launch Free to download

Your healthiest self is one snap away.

Free to download. 500 scan credits on us. No credit card, no commitment — just results.
